zh.lifeSummary: 當Thurstan de Banastre de Basset of Drayton於1057年出生在法國布列塔尼普盧易奧時，他的父親Sir Robert de Banastre III27歲，母親Baroness Cecily de Basset23歲。他於1081年與Ædgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxony在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1110年在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thurstan de Banastre de Basset of Drayton于1057年出生在法国布列塔尼普盧易奧时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Banastre III27岁，母亲Baroness Cecily de Basset23岁。他于1081年与Ædgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxony在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1110年在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Thurstan
meanings: An old name. The same as the Old and Middle High German names Turstan, Thurstan, Turstein, signifying 'Thor's stone;' figuratively 'Thor's defence;' from Anglo-Saxon stdn, Old Norman steinn. It is found Latinised Turstanus. Thor is found in many old names, as Thurgar, Thurgood, Thurkettle, Thurkle, Thurtle.

en.lifeSummary: When Thurstan de Banastre de Basset of Drayton was born in 1057, in Plouigneau, Brittany, France, his father, Sir Robert de Banastre III, was 27 and his mother, Baroness Cecily de Basset, was 23. He married Ædgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxony in 1081, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1110, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thurstan de Banastre de Basset of Drayton est né en 1057, à Plouigneau, Bretagne, France, son père, Sir Robert de Banastre III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Baroness Cecily de Basset, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Ædgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxony en 1081, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1110, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Drayton Basset, Staffordshire, England: Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thurstan de Banastre de Basset of Drayton 1057 in Plouigneau, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Banastre III 27 und seine Mutter Baroness Cecily de Basset 23. Er hat 1081 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Ædgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxony geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1110 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thurstan de Banastre de Basset of Drayton è nato il nel 1057 nel Plouigneau, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Banastre III, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Cecily de Basset, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ædgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxony nel 1081, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1110, nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thurstan de Banastre de Basset of Draytonが1057年にフランスブレタグンプロウイグネアウで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Banastre IIIは27歳，母Baroness Cecily de Bassetは23歳であった。1081年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでÆdgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxonyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1110年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thurstan de Banastre de Basset of Drayton(이)가 1057년 프랑스 브레타그니 플루익니오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Banastre III(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Cecily de Basset(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1081년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 Ædgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxony(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1110년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thurstan de Banastre de Basset of Drayton nasceu em 1057, em Plouigneau, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Sir Robert de Banastre III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Cecily de Basset, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ædgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxony em 1081, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1110, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Drayton Basset, Staffordshire, England: Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thurstan de Banastre de Basset of Drayton родился в 1057 г. в местности плуигно, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Banastre III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Cecily de Basset, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ædgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxony в 1081 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1110 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Ædgitha Adlfflædasdatter of Sachsen - Saxony en 1081, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1110, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
